creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 239089
6.26.06 v3

- remove git build dependency

testport results:

124amd64: OK
131amd64: OK
140amd64: plist issues:

---
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: lib/root/std_config.pcm
===> Error: Plist issues found.
---

I've uploaded logs to https://people.freebsd.org/~eduardo/logs/root/v3/
and on 14 it doesn't install "std_config.pcm" file.

Any clue of why this happens?

Just in case I will do parallel tests using this diff on 6.26.10 version to have some comparison.
